basic_details.job_title: IBPS PO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 6715 Probationary Officers/Management Trainees Posts
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Prelim Exam, Main Exam, Personality Test, Interview
basic_details.short_information: This section gives a quick snapshot of the IBPS PO/MT-XVI Bharti 2026 for candidates who want the key facts at a glance. The Common Recruitment Process (CRP) is conducted once a year by IBPS on behalf of 11 public sector banks for vacancies arising in the financial year 2027-28.

application_fee.details: The application fee for IBPS PO/MT-XVI Recruitment 2026 depends on the candidate's category and must be paid online between 01 July 2026 and 21 July 2026. Bank transaction charges for online payment are to be borne by the candidate separately. | Payment can be made through Debit Cards (RuPay/Visa/MasterCard/Maestro), Credit Cards, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Cards, Mobile Wallets, or UPI. Candidates should note that the fee applicable for modifying the application during the Edit Window is an additional ₹200/-, which is non-refundable and uniformly applicable to all categories.

qualification.details: Candidates wondering about the IBPS PO Eligibility Criteria 2026 can note that both age and educational qualification requirements must be fulfilled by the specified cut-off dates. The eligibility criteria mentioned in the notification are the basic requirements for applying, and final eligibility is subject to verification by IBPS and the participating banks at every stage of the recruitment process. | The minimum age required is 20 years and the maximum age is 30 years, meaning candidates must be born not earlier than 02.07.1996 and not later than 01.07.2006. Age relaxation is available for reserved category candidates as detailed below. | Candidates should hold a Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a University recognised by the Government of India, or an equivalent qualification recognized by the Central Government, as on 21.07.2026. The candidate must possess a valid mark-sheet or degree certificate confirming graduation on the day of registration and must indicate the percentage of marks obtained in Graduation, calculated to the nearest two decimals.

salary_details.details: Candidates asking about the IBPS PO Salary 2026 can refer to the official pay scale specified for the Probationary Officer/Management Trainee post. The basic pay structure is ₹48,480-2000/7-62,480-2340/2-67,160-2680/7-85,920, and selected officials will also be eligible for allowances and perquisites as per the rules of the participating bank in force from time to time. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The IBPS PO/MT-XVI Selection Process 2026 consists of four stages: Online Preliminary Examination
and Common Interview. Only candidates who qualify at each stage move forward to the next
and provisional allotment is done based on the final combined score and vacancies reported by the banks.
There is a penalty of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer in the objective tests
while unattempted questions carry no penalty.
Candidates who qualify the Main Examination are called for a self-report Personality Test
which is non-qualifying in nature but mandatory to attend for interview eligibility. The Personality Test may be conducted in proctored mode or at designated examination centres

with minimum qualifying marks of 40% (35% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates). The final combined score is calculated using a weightage ratio of 80:20 between the Main Examination and Interview respectively.
how_to_apply: Candidates who want to know how to complete the IBPS PO/MT-XVI Apply Online process can follow the steps below. Applications can only be submitted online through the official IBPS website; no other mode of application is accepted.
Visit the official website www.ibps.in and click on "CRP PO/MT" on the homepage.
Click "CLICK HERE TO APPLY ONLINE FOR CRP-PROBATIONARY OFFICERS/MANAGEMENT TRAINEES (CRP-PO/MT-XVI)".
Click "CLICK HERE FOR NEW REGISTRATION" and enter basic details to generate a provisional registration number and password.
Upload photograph, signature, left thumb impression, hand-written declaration, and SSC/SSLC/10th standard certificate as per the specified format and size.
Fill in all details carefully using the "SAVE AND NEXT" facility before final submission, since no changes are allowed after clicking "COMPLETE REGISTRATION".
Pay the applicable application fee/intimation charges online.
Take a printout of the e-receipt and the completed online application form for future reference.
Direct Link to Apply Online for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI

all_official_links.label: Download IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI Notification PDF Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window for IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI closes on 21 July 2026, with registration having started on 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in IBPS PO/MT-XVI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 6715 indicative vacancies for Probationary Officer/Management Trainee posts across 11 participating banks, though vacancies for Indian Bank, UCO Bank, and Union Bank of India were not reported at the time of notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 20 and 30 years as on 01.07.2026, with age relaxation available for SC/ST (5 years), OBC-NCL (3 years), PwBD (10 years), and eligible Ex-servicemen (5 years).

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IBPS PO/MT-XVI?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognised university, with the result declared on or before 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹175/- for SC/ST/PwBD candidates and ₹850/- for all other categories, payable online only.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves four stages: Online Preliminary Examination, Online Main Examination, Personality Test, and Common Interview, followed by provisional allotment to a participating bank.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary of IBPS PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The basic pay scale is ₹48,480-2000/7-62,480-2340/2-67,160-2680/7-85,920, along with allowances and perquisites as per the participating bank's rules.

faq.question: Q8. When will the Preliminary Examination for IBPS PO/MT-XVI be held?
faq.answer: The Online Preliminary Examination is tentatively scheduled for August 2026, with the Main Examination expected in October 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there a penalty for wrong answers in IBPS PO/MT-XVI exams?
faq.answer: Yes, 0.25 marks are deducted for each wrong answer in the objective tests, while unattempted questions do not carry any penalty.

faq.question: Q10. Which banks are participating in IBPS CRP PO/MT-XVI 2026?
faq.answer: The 11 participating banks are Bank of Baroda, Bank of India, Bank of Maharashtra, Canara Bank, Central Bank of India, Indian Bank, Indian Overseas Bank, Punjab National Bank, Punjab & Sind Bank, UCO Bank, and Union Bank of India.
